summary: Crop tool rework card created (todo/idea). Resolution Type -> Ratio|Free only. Ratio = orientation toggle + NEW pure-aspect table (all existing ratios + cinema), no resolutions. Divisible-by input (default 16) above Apply, rounds selected output W/H UP to next multiple, DOWN to prev if it exceeds source (never invent pixels). Image+video crop paths. Also: Resize tool default divisible_by 1->16 (image+video).

Large plan attached; maturity idea->planned. 4 phases: (1) CROP_RATIOS pure-aspect table + cinema SVG icons; (2) Crop tool-options Ratio/Free + divisible-by input above Apply; (3) round-up helper + image/video apply rounding (video needs absoluteCropPx server bypass vs snapEven); (4) Resize default divisible 1->16 in BOTH component AND resizeInjector. Verify mode: user-ux. Research in research/.
todo->doing, maturity in-progress. Implementation started; checklist derived from 4 plan phases. Starting Phase 1.
Phase 1 complete: CROP_RATIOS pure-aspect table + 4 cinema icons. Self-check PASSED (shape, ratios, floats, icon resolution, freeze). Data-only, no UI surface yet — visible check deferred to Phase 2.
Phase 2 code complete: MpiToolOptionsCrop -> Ratio/Free + Divisible-by input above Apply. ESLint clean, no stale refs. user-ux visual check pending (app already on :3000, user owns it).

Phase 3+4 code complete. roundToDivisible helper (js/utils/cropRounding.js) + image (MpiCanvasViewer._runCrop) + video (MpiGroupHistoryBlock._handleCropSaveVideo -> absoluteCropPx; videoCrop.js bypass) apply rounding; Resize default 1->16 both files. Portrait cinema icon fix (user caught): 4 tall portrait icons added. New test crop-ratios-divisible.test.cjs 3/3 green; existing ratio tests 11/11. ESLint clean. Image round-up needs in-app check; video round-up user-ux (real video).
user-verified in app: image crop now /16-clean (crop_002 1024x432, crop_003 240x432); RATIO/FREE UI + cinema icons (portrait tall fix) confirmed. Tests green, ESLint clean.
doing->done, maturity complete, status accepted. All 4 phases user-verified/tested. Crop Ratio/Free + divisible round-up + Resize default 16.
Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-261/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
